---
title: "Part VI: Social impacts of AI systems"
---

## Learning outcomes

Students will be able to:

{{< include /_includes/learning-outcomes/_part-06_learning-outcomes.qmd >}}

## Select topics

-   How will our society change?
    -   AI entertainment and new art forms
    -   Changes in the structure of the workforce
    -   AI-powered social connections with real people
    -   AI friends
-   AGI and Superhuman intelligence
    -   Using the metaphor of a corporation to understand superhuman AI
    -   Benefits: problems we may need superhuman intelligence to address
    -   Risks and potential mitigations; existential risk
-   Sentience
    -   Reasons to believe current AI systems are not sentient
    -   Philosophical view on “the hard problem of consciousness”
